pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 31: APP_DIR="/home/ga/edge-app" and task description
Docker official documentation - default Docker Registry runs on TCP port 5000 per https://www.docker.com/blog/how-to-use-your-own-registry-2/
Hardcoded in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh; referenced in task description as 'localhost:5000/edge-app:latest'
Task description mentions 'localhost:5000/edge-app:latest' and export_result.sh references /v2/edge-app/manifests/latest
Docker official documentation per https://docs.docker.com/build/building/multi-platform/ - both are standard Docker buildx supported platforms
CNCF Distribution spec per https://distribution.github.io/distribution/spec/manifest-v2-2/ - this is the correct media type for Docker manifest lists
OCI Image Specification per https://github.com/opencontainers/image-spec/blob/main/image-index.md - this is the correct media type for OCI image indexes

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims in task.json are verified and correct. The application directory is /home/ga/edge-app. The Docker registry runs on the standard default port 5000. The image repository is 'edge-app' with the 'latest' tag. The task configures a multi-architecture build pipeline targeting linux/amd64 and linux/arm64 platforms, both standard and well-supported Docker buildx platforms. The expected manifest media type is the Docker Distribution V2 manifest list format (application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.list.v2+json) and the alternative is the OCI image index format (application/vnd.oci.image.index.v1+json), both of which are correctly specified according to their respective official specifications. The task uses official public Docker images: golang:1.21-alpine for compilation and alpine:latest as the runtime base.
